title: versioning — health probes
description: Three probes registered with foundation's HealthAggregator at boot.

probes.name: versioning-registry-loaded
probes.description: ApiVersionRegistry loaded on ApplicationBooted. Critical — without the registry, every request fails resolution.

probes.name: versioning-default-version-set
probes.description: Exactly one ApiVersion row has is_default=true AND state IN (released, deprecated). Critical — no default = no fallback for unresolved requests.

probes.name: versioning-transformer-chains-valid
probes.description: For every released → deprecated version pair with pinned WebhookSubscriptions, verify a transformer chain exists. Warns when a chain is missing (some pinned subs will fail on next dispatch); fails only when every chain is missing (severe misconfiguration).
